# Support

## Where to Get Help
- **GitHub Issues**: For bug reports and feature requests
- **Discussions**: For questions, ideas and general community chat
- **Documentation**: First check official docs for common problems

## Bug Reports
Please include:
- Project version
- Operating system & environment
- Reproduction steps
- Expected vs actual behavior
- Error logs and stack traces

## Feature Requests
Describe your use case, expected behavior, and benefits to the project.

## No Support
We do not provide custom development, one-on-one technical consulting,
or urgent production support for free.
